session.user: Run `prettier --write docs/learned/planning/lifecycle.md docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` from the working directory /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the result. Do NOT fix any errors — just report them.
session.assistant: I'll run the prettier command to format the specified files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run prettier on three markdown files

session.assistant:
prettier passed: All 3 files formatted successfully
